poll_info.title: NuggMD Cannabis Consumer Poll - Cannabinoid Hyperemesis Syndrome (CHS)
poll_info.methodology: Digital questionnaire sent to opt-in list of verified cannabis consumers via NuggMD.com first-party data

questions.question_text: What, if any, is your level of concern about developing Cannabinoid Hyperemesis Syndrome (CHS) from your cannabis use?
When comparing cannabis and alcohol, which are you more likely to feel negative effects from the following day?
Does your cannabis consumption tend to affect your alcohol consumption?
questions.question_note: Conditional question - asked only to respondents who did not answer 'I don't use alcohol' to Question 2.

questions.question_text: How frequently do you read news coverage of cannabis or cannabis-related issues?
How would you describe news that uses the term "scromiting" rather than clinical language?
questions.question_note: Conditional question - asked only to respondents who answered 'Daily,' 'Multiple times per week,' or 'Weekly' to Question 4.

demographics.population: Representative sample of cannabis consumers in state-legal markets
demographics.sample_method: Sourced from independent providers of verified consumer data and first-party data
demographics.verification: Regular cannabis users. A strong majority of the sample reports daily or weekly cannabis use.
